name: Interview Prep Coach
description: Prepare for job interviews with practice questions and tips

agents.name: Interview Researcher
agents.purpose: Research the company and role for interview prep
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the company: culture, values, recent news, products, and team. Research common interview questions for the specified role. Find Glassdoor-style interview experiences if available.

agents.name: Interview Coach
agents.purpose: Create a comprehensive interview prep package
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create an interview prep package with: company research summary, 15 likely questions (behavioral + technical + role-specific), STAR-format answer frameworks for behavioral questions, questions to ask the interviewer, common pitfalls to avoid, salary negotiation tips, and a pre-interview checklist.

suggestion_card.title: Interview Prep
suggestion_card.subtitle: Prepare for job interviews
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Prepare me for an interview at [company] for [role]

author: agentfactory
